title: (Bullish Signal) SHEN, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on Nov 17, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 41 similar cases, and 36 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 88%. Current price $44.65 crossed the support line at $45.97 and is trading between $45.97 support and $44.09 support lines. Throughout the month of 10/19/20 - 11/18/20, the price experienced a +2% Uptrend, while the week of 11/11/20 - 11/18/20 shows a -4% Downtrend. 

https://preview.redd.it/2o8xtlgsk8061.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=11b4794e458f51ad9f710412d68d303e545fa67d

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where SHEN's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 14 of 22 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 64%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 09, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SHEN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 65 of 84 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for SHEN just turned positive on November 03, 2020. Looking at past instances where SHEN's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 32 of 48 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

The 10-day Moving Average for SHEN crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 18, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

Following a +11.39% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SHEN advanced for three days, in 235 of 319 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 192 of 262 cases where SHEN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 73%.
